projects.name: Voice Inbox

projects.name: Piscina Alta
projects.description: Piscina Alta – Calarossa: the Sardinia pool/property project (Calarossa, Sardinia Sun Escape context). Tasks, works, bookings and coordination — Michela is a key contact.

projects.name: General Inbox
